[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000100000 1
4 000000001 1
5 110000010 3
6 000000100 1
7 000100000 1

01 001000000 1
12 000100001 2
23 110000010 3 match 5
34 000000000 a match 0 1 2
45 000101000 2
56 000000100 1 match 6
67 110110011 6
70 000000100 1 match 6

13 000100011 3
24 100000010 2
35 000000000 a match 0 1 2
46 000001100 2

71 001000100 2

36 000000100 1 match 6

72 001000100 2
